title: Kraken
html:
April 2021 crypto-onboarding fragment by Yahir — Kraken, Binance, and SafePal account credentials captured in plain text (privacy-sweep import preserves the raw, but credentials should be considered burned). Companion to the same-week $250 Coinbase note.

TL;DR

  • 18-year-old Yahir simultaneously onboarding to Kraken, Binance, and SafePal in April 2021 — peak of the crypto retail-on-ramp.
  • Safemoon mentioned as the "Pneumatic" entry under SafePal, anchoring the SafeMoon era.
  • Sibling note to 2021 04 20 250 coinbase (two days later) — both part of the same crypto account-spinup wave.

yahir gonzalez · crypto · coinbase · safemoon · 2021 04 20 250 coinbase
